zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Courtenay於1414年5月3日出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon25歲，母親Anne Talbot22歲。他於1431年與Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon在英國戴文哈可姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年2月3日在英國波克夏阿炳頓享年43歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Courtenay于1414年5月3日出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon25岁，母亲Anne Talbot22岁。他于1431年与Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon在英国戴文哈可姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年2月3日在英国波克夏阿炳頓享年43岁，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Courtenay was born on 3 May 1414, in Devon, England, his father, Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon, was 25 and his mother, Anne Talbot, was 22. He married Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon in 1431, in Haccombe, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 3 February 1458, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Courtenay est né le 3 mai 1414, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anne Talbot, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon en 1431, à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 3 février 1458, à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Courtenay am 3. Mai 1414 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon 25 und seine Mutter Anne Talbot 22. Er hat 1431 in Haccombe, Devon, England Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Februar 1458 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Abingdon, Berkshire, England und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Courtenay è nato il il 3 maggio 1414 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Anne Talbot, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon nel 1431, nel Haccombe, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1458, nel Abingdon, Berkshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Courtenayが1414年5月3日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devonは25歳，母Anne Talbotは22歳であった。1431年にイギリスデボンハッコインベでMargaret Beaufort Countess of Devonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年2月3日にイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンで43歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Courtenay(이)가 1414년 5월 3일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Talbot(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1431년 영국 데폰 하c코브에서 Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 2월 3일 영국 버크실르 압잉던에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

mn.3 May 1414–3 February 1458: 1414 оны Тавдугаар сарын 3–1458 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 3

pt.3 May 1414–3 February 1458: 3 de maio de 1414–3 de fevereiro de 1458
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Courtenay nasceu em 3 de maio de 1414, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anne Talbot, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon em 1431, em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1458, em Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Courtenay родился 3 мая 1414 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Talbot, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon в 1431 г. в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 3 февраля 1458 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.

es.3 May 1414–3 February 1458: 3 de mayo de 1414–3 de febrero de 1458
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Courtenay nació el 3 de mayo de 1414, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Courtenay 4th Earl of Devon, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anne Talbot, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon en 1431, en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1458, en Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.
